hero.title: Your <highlight>€2,500 Health Budget</highlight>. Effectively for €0.
hero.subtitle: Why pay for treatments yourself when the system can cover them? With SDK supplementary insurance + the IKK Classic bonus program, you get up to €2,500 for Heilpraktiker, glasses, preventive care and more — and effectively pay nothing thanks to the bonus. No waiting periods. No health check. Start right away.

conceptAccordion.title: Healio: The Concept That Pays for Itself
conceptAccordion.section1Text1: Statutory health insurance provides you with solid basic coverage. But let's be honest: for what many people truly need, it's often not enough.
conceptAccordion.section1Text2: Whether Heilpraktiker, osteopathy, premium care or simply a new pair of glasses — you typically pay for all of it out of pocket.
conceptAccordion.section1Text3: Healio combines two things that are already strong on their own — but together form a real system:
conceptAccordion.section1Bullet1: Outpatient supplementary insurance that closes your coverage gaps.
conceptAccordion.section1Bullet2: And IKK classic with a bonus program that practically refinances this supplementary insurance.

planbarkeit.title: Predictability
planbarkeit.desc: You know in advance what you'll get — no unpleasant surprises.

erstattung.title: Reimbursement
erstattung.desc: Upload your invoice, reimbursement follows — no paperwork.

turbo.title: Turbo
turbo.desc: Bonus payments can offset your premiums.

conceptAccordion.hinweis: Healio is not a health insurance fund, but the digital platform for outpatient benefits.

bonusCalculator.title: Your Personal <highlight>Bonus Calculator</highlight>
bonusCalculator.subtitle: This is how the IKK Classic bonus works: Select your activities and see instantly how much you can get back!

fitness.title: Fitness device (e.g. Apple Watch)
fitness.desc: Subsidy option: up to €180 for fitness watch/tracker

bonusCalculator.trustNoteDesc: IKK Classic trusts its members. Proof is only requested in rare individual cases and on a spot-check basis. You don't need to meticulously document every activity — just report it and collect your bonus.
bonusCalculator.fitnessNote: Up to €180 subsidy for fitness devices
bonusCalculator.fitnessNoteDesc: IKK Classic subsidizes fitness devices like Apple Watch, fitness trackers and other fitness watches. Simply select the subsidy option on your bonus application and submit your purchase receipt. The amount depends on your collected bonus points.
bonusCalculator.editHint: Click on the premium to enter your individual amount (incl. risk surcharge).
bonusCalculator.bonusPayout: Your bonus is paid out or directly offset against your supplementary insurance. With 100% reimbursement, you get a €2,500 annual budget.

beispielrechnung.example: Example: Ms. Mueller, 32 years old, publicly insured
beispielrechnung.resultDesc: Ms. Mueller gets back more than she pays — and has a €2,500 budget with 100% reimbursement for Heilpraktiker, glasses, preventive care and more.

howItWorks.step2Desc: We show you — completely non-binding — how much bonus you can get from IKK.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Visit a doctor, Heilpraktiker or optician, submit the invoice and get your money back.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from people who are already using the Healio health budget.

julia.name: Julia S.
julia.text: I've been going to osteopathy for years, but paying €80 per session out of pocket was too much long-term. With Healio, 6 treatments were reimbursed at 90% last year. Together with the IKK bonus, I actually came out ahead. I wish I had known about this sooner!

thomas.name: Thomas & Katrin T.
thomas.text: We signed up with Healio for the whole family: new glasses for our son, my osteopathy after pregnancy, dental cleanings for all four of us and the bonus for the sports club. In one year we received over €1,200 in benefits and effectively pay nothing thanks to the IKK bonus.

max.name: Max B.
max.text: As a student, every euro counts. My new glasses cost €380, of which €300 was reimbursed by SDK. Plus €75 IKK bonus for university sports and €30 for the flu shot. My insurance premium is €19 per month. The math really works out.

sandra.name: Sandra M.
sandra.text: As a Heilpraktiker, I recommend Healio to my patients. Since then, many can afford longer treatment series that previously failed due to cost. For my practice, it means predictable income, and my patients get the therapy they truly need. A real win-win situation.

andreas.name: Andreas K.
andreas.text: Progressive lenses for €680, of which €500 was reimbursed by SDK. Plus professional dental cleaning twice a year via the IKK health account. I've been publicly insured for 30 years and have never had such good benefits. The switch to IKK took 5 minutes.

lisa.name: Lisa & Markus F.
lisa.text: Our son was born in January and we were able to add him within 2 months without a health check. Midwife follow-up care, osteopathy for the baby and my postnatal recovery courses are all subsidized. And the best part: thanks to the family bonus at IKK, we effectively don't pay anything extra.

ikkWechsel.title: IKK classic — your partner for better health
ikkWechsel.subtitle: IKK classic is one of Germany's largest statutory health insurance funds with over 3 million members and more than 140 years of experience. You get all statutory benefits — plus many valuable extras.
ikkWechsel.identicalSubtitle: at every statutory health insurance fund — guaranteed by law
ikkWechsel.identicalNote: Only with the remaining 2% (supplementary statutory benefits) are there differences between funds. And this is exactly where IKK classic excels:
ikkWechsel.extrasSubtitle: Where health insurance funds differ, IKK classic offers more

schwangerschaft.title: Pregnancy — over €1,100
schwangerschaft.desc: €250 midwife on-call, €100 prenatal care subsidy, €180 baby bonus, free partner course, minerals included.

osteopathie.title: Osteopathy — €160/year
osteopathie.desc: 4 sessions at €40 per calendar year — also for babies and children, no age limit.

bonus.title: Bonus program — over €700 possible
bonus.desc: For preventive care, sports and vaccinations. The subsidy option triples your cash bonus — with no cap.

spartarif.title: Savings plan — up to €600/year back
spartarif.desc: Premium refund if you only use preventive care. Vaccinations, check-ups and cancer screening don't count against you.

reiseimpfungen.title: Travel vaccinations
reiseimpfungen.desc: Yellow fever, Hepatitis A/B, typhoid and more — subsidized via the IKK classic health account.

gesundheitskurse.title: Health courses — €180/year extra
gesundheitskurse.desc: 2 courses at €90 per year for yoga, back training, nutrition or stress management. This budget is independent of the bonus program — so it comes on top.

bonusantrag.title: Bonus application until end of March
bonusantrag.desc: You have until March 31 of the following year to submit your bonus. No stress, no time pressure — and from 2026, a single activity is already enough.

umwelt.title: 10% for the environment
umwelt.desc: Healio donates 10% to environmental organizations. Health starts in a healthy environment — your switch actively supports environmental protection.

step1.title: Submit application
step1.desc: You sign up online with IKK classic. It takes just a few minutes.

step2.title: IKK handles the rest
step2.desc: IKK classic automatically cancels your old health insurance fund for you. You don't need to do anything.

step3.title: Seamlessly insured
step3.desc: After 2 months, you're a member. Your insurance coverage continues without interruption.

ikkWechsel.fearsTitle: Common Concerns — And Why They're Unfounded

leistungen.q: Will I lose benefits by switching?
leistungen.a: No. Over 98% of all statutory health insurance benefits are legally mandated and identical at every health insurance fund — doctor visits, hospital stays, medications, therapies. Only the so-called supplementary statutory benefits (approx. 2%) have minor differences, e.g. subsidies for osteopathy or travel vaccinations. Here, IKK classic actually offers more than many other funds.

arzt.q: Do I have to change my doctor or therapist?
arzt.a: No, absolutely not. You keep all your doctors, therapists and hospitals. Free choice of doctor is guaranteed by law and applies equally at every statutory health insurance fund.

kompliziert.a: Not at all. You sign up online with IKK classic — it takes just a few minutes. IKK classic automatically cancels your old fund for you. You don't need to worry about anything.

luecke.q: Will there be a gap in my coverage?
luecke.a: No. The transition is seamless. From the first day at IKK classic, you're fully insured — no waiting periods, no interruption.

behandlungen.a: Ongoing treatments are not interrupted. Approved therapies, cures or rehabilitation measures continue — the new fund takes over.

finalCTA.title: Ready to Fund Your Health Smartly?
finalCTA.subtitle: Start now and discover your health budget
